text: The content was very useful , especially the lessons that focused on applying the scientific method to computer science . I liked the fact that most concepts were taught , and then reviewed again at the end of a video , solidifying what I learned . I did find the quality of the videos to be rather lacking . As someone who develops online courses for a living , I suggest using two cameras so that you can switch between two views when a cut is needed to prevent jumping or leaving mistakes in videos . The professors definitely seemed nervous , but I suppose that goes away with time . Thank you for this awesome course !
